name: Turkey-Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Each sliced carrots and celery
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mushrooms, onion, celery, carrots, garlic, and margarine in a 2 quart casserole; microwave, uncovered at HIGH for 6 to 7 minutes, stirring after 3 minutes.
2. Add flour, salt, thyme, and marjoram; stir well.
3. Add milk and the next three ingredients (chicken broth, cubed cooked turkey, and cooked regular rice), stirring well.
4. Microwave, uncovered at HIGH for 6 to 9 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring every 2 minutes.
5. Yields about 5 cups.
